comment.body:
Buy the dip is strong with crowd. Yom Kippur, Sep Seasonality, Window of weakness from Cem and Window of reversion might not work with an admin hell bent on keeping this elevated. 

Simply riding the wave is best until one sees atleast 9 or 20emas get broken. Only happened 2 times in August ( 9 and 22nd) and quickly recovered. Also one misses out on longs waiting for those magical windows. 

Up and upward it is
